.gitignore.general_idea: Explicitly include the Maven wrapper JAR in version control to ensure build reproducibility.
Ignore application log directories to prevent cluttering the repository with runtime artifacts.
Ignore environment configuration files to prevent accidental leakage of secrets or local settings.
Remove NetBeans-specific ignore patterns as the project likely no longer uses this IDE.
Remove explicit WAR file ignore pattern, relying on the general target/ directory exclusion instead.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the migration from Java Servlets/JSP to Spring Boot 3.2 and ReactJS.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Java (Servlets), Jakarta EE' and 'JSP' with 'Spring Boot 3.2' and 'ReactJS + Vite' in the technologies section.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new full-stack project structure separating client and server directories.
README.md.human_impl: Added a tree diagram showing 'client/' for React and 'src/' for Spring Boot backend.

README.md.general_idea: Update backend configuration instructions to use Spring Boot application.properties instead of manual Java connection classes.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced instructions to edit 'conexion.java' with instructions to edit 'application.properties' for datasource and JWT secret.

README.md.general_idea: Add configuration instructions for the new React frontend environment.
README.md.human_impl: Added section explaining how to configure API URL in 'client/src/services/api.js'.

README.md.general_idea: Update execution instructions to reflect separate build and run processes for Spring Boot and React.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'mvn clean package' and 'start server' with 'mvn spring-boot:run' and 'npm run dev' in separate steps.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new REST API endpoints and authentication flow.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections for 'Endpoints del Backend' listing auth, profile, employee, request, and attendance endpoints with HTTP methods.

README.md.general_idea: Document the specific user roles defined in the new system.
README.md.human_impl: Added a table defining roles: admin, recursos_humanos, contador, and empleado.
